title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 319.046 - Arbitration of disputes, when
text:
319.046.  Arbitration of disputes, when. — Parties with a dispute related to the provisions of sections 319.015 to 319.050 may request arbitration for disputes of less than five thousand dollars.
(L. 2014 H.B. 1867) 
Effective 1-01-15
